title: HU12 0TA, Cattle (Holderness) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AP3400SG/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Cattle (Holderness) Limited   Installation name: Willow Tree Farm   Permit number: EPR/AP3400SG/V003   "
